_comment: Venue registry (Step 15). open=true means any band with a demo/press kit can book. Otherwise booking is gated by req (checked against the player's global fame/fans, release count, and per-town show count in state.showsByTown). drawMult scales audience + pay (bigger rooms pay more). town links a venue to its map. Performing happens at the venue's stage (interior venues like The Dive / The Foundry) or via the venue panel (storefront venues).
